name: Wood & Brewer, LLC
description_short: Central Ohio bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, debt settlement, and student loan resolution with 20+ years of experience.
description_long:
Wood & Brewer, LLC is a law practice based in Worthington, Ohio that has operated for more than 20 years in Central Ohio. The firm was founded by attorneys Brian Wood and Katy Brewer with a mission to help individuals facing financial and legal difficulties navigate complex bankruptcy and debt situations. The firm's tagline, "Your Case. Your Life. Our Priority," reflects their client-centered approach to legal representation.

The firm offers comprehensive bankruptcy services including Chapter 7 bankruptcy filing, Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing, debt settlement assistance, and student loan debt counseling. They also provide educational resources through their "Is Bankruptcy For Me?" consultation offering to help clients determine whether bankruptcy is the appropriate course of action. Each client receives personalized counsel based on their specific financial situation, needs, and goals rather than a one-size-fits-all approach.

Wood & Brewer distinguishes itself through its established track record (20+ years in the region), free initial 30-minute consultations, and emphasis on accessibility—they serve multiple Ohio counties including Franklin, Fairfield, and Delaware counties, plus surrounding areas like Sunbury, Galena, and Centerburg. Client testimonials highlight attorney responsiveness and the ability to make a complex process manageable. The firm explicitly addresses common financial hardships that warrant bankruptcy consideration, including foreclosure threats, wage garnishment, repossession, and creditor harassment.

The firm operates as a traditional law practice focused specifically on bankruptcy and debt relief rather than broader legal services. As with any bankruptcy attorney, fees and outcomes depend on individual case complexity. The website provides limited information about specific fee structures, timeline expectations, or success metrics beyond client testimonials.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Over 20 years of established experience specifically in Central Ohio bankruptcy law
Offers free 30-minute initial consultation to evaluate cases before committing
Personalized counsel rather than standardized approach—evaluates individual circumstances to determine best legal strategy
Serves multiple counties across Central Ohio (Franklin, Fairfield, Delaware, plus surrounding areas)
Direct contact via phone (614-396-7280) and website consultation request form for accessibility
Client testimonials emphasize responsiveness and ability to simplify complex bankruptcy process
Addresses all major personal bankruptcy categories (Chapter 7, Chapter 13, debt settlement, student loans)
cons: Website does not provide specific fee structure, payment plans, or cost estimates for services
No timeline information provided for how long Chapter 7 vs. Chapter 13 cases typically take
Limited information about attorney qualifications, bar certifications, or specialization credentials beyond years of experience
No data on case outcomes, success rates, or specific results clients can expect
Service area limited to Central Ohio region; not available for out-of-state bankruptcy filers
best_for: Central Ohio residents facing Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing decisions
Individuals experiencing creditor harassment, wage garnishment, or foreclosure threats
People with student loan debt seeking modification or discharge options
Those considering debt settlement as alternative to full bankruptcy
diagnosis: Wood & Brewer is best for Central Ohio residents who need professional guidance determining whether bankruptcy is appropriate for their specific financial situation and who value a personalized, experienced approach over high-volume processing. The main caveat is that the firm operates as a traditional bankruptcy law practice requiring clients to navigate fee structures and timelines through direct consultation rather than transparent online pricing.
services: Student loan debt evaluation and strategy
Bankruptcy suitability assessment ("Is Bankruptcy For Me?")
Personalized financial and legal strategy development
Service across Franklin, Fairfield, Delaware, and surrounding Ohio counties
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 705 Lakeview Plaza Blvd # M, Worthington, OH 43085
